title: hovea linearis
intro: Hovea linearis, also known as the blue mountain flower or blue pea, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hovea linearis include its ability to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. Hovea linearis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
